title: Yijing Hexagram 63: Ji Ji (After Completion)
description: Hexagram 63 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 63 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: After Completion. Success in small matters. Perseverance furthers. At the beginning good fortune; at the end disorder.
